tagline: De-AI your prose and learn your voice as you write

highlights.title: Point, Don't Type
highlights.description: Select any sentence and a popup offers five taste-derived rewrite directions — cut the AI metaphor, tighten, let it breathe, punch harder, sink the argument. You steer the prose by pointing, never by writing feedback.

highlights.title: Cross-Family De-AI
highlights.description: Claude, GPT, and Gemini break each other out of their own RLHF habits, with a disruption dial from gentler to bolder. Watch prose go from one-glance-AI to reads-human.

highlights.title: A Taste That Learns
highlights.description: A living profile of your voice floor, a symptom rubric, and a gauge of what WordTaste has learned about you. Every judgment you make sharpens the next session.
